# Pull request checklist

## Summary

Describe what this PR implements.

## Phase / issue

- Phase:
- Issue:

## Markable checklist

- [ ] I read `AGENTS.md`.
- [ ] I used the relevant skill from `.agents/skills` or documented why not.
- [ ] I updated `docs/PLAN_CHECKLIST.md`.
- [ ] I did not delete existing user code unexpectedly.
- [ ] Optional runtimes still fall back to SVG.
- [ ] No external network calls were added.
- [ ] Reduced-motion behavior is respected.
- [ ] Missing assets do not crash the extension.

## Checks run

- [ ] typecheck
- [ ] lint
- [ ] tests
- [ ] build
- [ ] extension smoke test

If a check was not run, explain why:

## Screenshots / notes

Add screenshots, logs, or implementation notes when useful.
